summary: Iteration 3 regression smoke after frontend code-quality refactor (no-localStorage tokens, useMemo/useCallback, console.error in catches). Backend smoke: admin login (Bearer + httpOnly cookie), GET /api/auth/me via both, GET /api/admin/clients (3 clients, returns both id and _id with purchase/sales counts), POST /api/admin/clients (200, returns id+_id), and 401 on unauthenticated admin route. Frontend E2E: admin login -> admin-shell -> Clients list -> add-client-btn opens New client dialog; reload preserves admin session via httpOnly cookie. Client login (newly created E2E client) -> client-shell -> btn-purchase + btn-sales visible -> tap btn-purchase routes to /portal/list/purchase showing the list view; reload preserves client session. Verified localStorage contains NO access/token keys (only posthog analytics), confirming the in-memory-only Bearer refactor.
passed: GET /api/auth/me via Bearer returns admin payload
GET /api/auth/me via httpOnly cookie returns admin payload
GET /api/admin/clients returns list with id, _id, purchase_outstanding, sales_outstanding
Admin login UI -> admin-shell renders (data-testid present)
Clients page renders add-client-btn; clicking opens New client dialog (role=dialog visible)
Page reload restores admin session (cookie-based session restoration confirmed)
Clicking btn-purchase navigates to /portal/list/purchase and renders Purchase Invoices list view
Page reload restores client session via httpOnly cookie
localStorage contains NO token/access_token keys (in-memory bearer refactor verified; only posthog key present)
notes: Console warnings observed (non-blocking): 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' on the New client dialog — accessibility-only, not a regression.
Initial 401s on /api/auth/me before login are expected (probing session on app boot).
Test client created via API for E2E: clienttest1782681609@example.com / Client12345!
